overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game. The player rides a motorcycle through neon-lit city streets, dismounts, and explores on foot through urban plazas and buildings, eventually ascending an outdoor staircase. The environment features futuristic architecture with vibrant neon signage and a mix of natural morning light and artificial illumination.

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide outdoor staircase flanked by towering buildings with neon signage. Pedestrians move in the opposite direction, descending the stairs, while the camera moves steadily upward toward the top of the stairway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a high-speed ride through a neon-lit metropolis into the intimate interior of a cyberpunk diner. It begins with a steady forward glide through a wide multi-lane street, where the motorcycle dashboard is visible against a backdrop of towering buildings draped in glowing advertisements. As the vehicle slows to a stop beside a purple neon AUTO CORNER sign, the camera transitions to a walking pace, moving away from the shaded streets and into a sunlit urban plaza featuring the TENGU hotel. The scene then shifts toward a commercial building marked by a prominent TURBO sign, crossing the threshold from the bright outdoor light into a dim interior. Finally, the camera pushes through the diner, where the atmosphere transforms into a haze of green neon strips and pink ceiling lights surrounding seated NPCs.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a building out into a sprawling urban plaza that eventually leads upward into a towering cityscape. It begins by exiting a structure into a spacious open area filled with decorative trees and pedestrian bridges, where the lighting shifts back to natural daylight. As the camera moves through the plaza, the scene opens toward a distinctive building adorned with large blue spherical structures and pink neon lighting. The perspective then shifts toward a wide outdoor staircase, ascending steadily between towering buildings flanked by vibrant neon signage. Finally, the camera climbs toward the top of the stairway, passing pedestrians descending in the opposite direction.
